title: Bitter Flour Pancake Stack
description: This Whole30-friendly dish features a dense and bitter batter made from rice flour, ideal for an energizing breakfast or snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix rice flour and salt. Add water gradually while stirring until the mixture forms a smooth dough.
Heat oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Drop small spoonfuls of batter onto the skillet; pancakes will be dense and not fluffy.
Cook for about 1-2 minutes on each side, or until golden brown. Repeat with remaining batter.
Serve hot as is or top with your favorite ingredients like fresh herbs or spices.
